system.name: Tarabala System
system.description: Nine-fold star strength system based on birth nakshatra for compatibility and auspiciousness
system.purpose: Determine favorable and unfavorable nakshatras for activities, compatibility, and transits
system.basis: Count from birth nakshatra to determine which Tara any nakshatra falls in
system.importance: Very high for muhurta, compatibility, and transit timing
system.vedicReferences: Detailed in muhurta texts, Brihat Samhita, and compatibility chapters
system.usage: Count from birth nakshatra in sequence to find which Tara a nakshatra belongs to

tarabalas.name: Janma Tara
tarabalas.counting: Count 1, 10, 19 from birth nakshatra (including birth nakshatra as 1)
tarabalas.description: Birth star and its repeating cycle - neutral but requires care

effects.general: Neutral to slightly unfavorable, needs caution, mixed results
effects.muhurta: Avoid for important events unless other factors strong
effects.compatibility: Moderate compatibility, requires other positive factors
effects.transit: Moon transit brings mixed results, self-focus period
effects.activities: Routine activities okay, avoid major new beginnings

tarabalas.compatibility: 50% - Neutral compatibility, needs support from other factors
tarabalas.vedicQuote: Janma Tara brings self-focus but obstacles in worldly pursuits

tarabalas.name: Sampat Tara
tarabalas.description: Wealth and prosperity star - brings abundance and success

effects.general: Excellent for all activities, brings wealth and prosperity, highly favorable
effects.muhurta: Best for important events, marriages, business starts, property purchases
effects.compatibility: Excellent compatibility, prosperity in relationship, mutual growth
effects.transit: Moon transit brings financial gains, success, happy period
effects.activities: All auspicious activities favored, best time for major decisions

negativeAspects: May create over-confidence if not balanced
tarabalas.compatibility: 100% - Excellent compatibility, wealth and prosperity in relationship
tarabalas.vedicQuote: Sampat Tara is the most auspicious, bringing wealth and all prosperity

tarabalas.name: Vipat Tara
tarabalas.description: Danger and calamity star - brings obstacles, accidents, and losses

effects.general: Very unfavorable, danger, accidents, losses, obstacles, calamities
effects.muhurta: Strictly avoid for all important activities
effects.compatibility: Very poor compatibility, conflicts, dangers in relationship
effects.transit: Moon transit brings accidents, losses, health issues, conflicts
effects.activities: Avoid all major activities, even routine work may face obstacles

tarabalas.compatibility: 0% - Very poor compatibility, danger and conflict in relationship
tarabalas.vedicQuote: Vipat Tara is most dangerous, avoid all important activities

tarabalas.name: Kshema Tara
tarabalas.description: Welfare and well-being star - brings peace, stability, and protection

effects.general: Favorable for most activities, brings welfare and stability, protective energy
effects.muhurta: Good for important events, especially peace-oriented activities
effects.compatibility: Good compatibility, peaceful relationship, mutual welfare
effects.transit: Moon transit brings peace, stability, welfare activities favored
effects.activities: Favorable for stable ventures, peace agreements, welfare work

tarabalas.compatibility: 75% - Good compatibility with peaceful, stable relationship
tarabalas.vedicQuote: Kshema Tara brings welfare and protection in all endeavors

tarabalas.name: Pratyak Tara
tarabalas.description: Obstacle and hindrance star - brings delays, blocks, and difficulties

effects.general: Unfavorable, obstacles, delays, hindrances, difficulties, blocked progress
effects.muhurta: Avoid for important events, delays and obstacles expected
effects.compatibility: Poor compatibility, obstacles in relationship, hindrances
effects.transit: Moon transit brings delays, frustrations, blocked efforts
effects.activities: Avoid new starts, delays in completion, obstacles arise

tarabalas.compatibility: 25% - Poor compatibility with obstacles and hindrances in relationship
tarabalas.vedicQuote: Pratyak Tara creates obstacles and delays, patience required

tarabalas.name: Sadhaka Tara
tarabalas.description: Achievement and accomplishment star - brings success through effort

effects.general: Very favorable, achievements, success, goals accomplished, efforts rewarded
effects.muhurta: Excellent for important events, especially goal-oriented activities
effects.compatibility: Very good compatibility, mutual achievements, success together
effects.transit: Moon transit brings accomplishments, goals met, success period
effects.activities: Excellent for all productive activities, goals achieved

tarabalas.compatibility: 87.5% - Very good compatibility with mutual achievements and success
tarabalas.vedicQuote: Sadhaka Tara brings achievement and success through dedicated effort

tarabalas.name: Vadha Tara
tarabalas.description: Destruction and death star - brings severe difficulties, destruction, and dangers

effects.general: Very unfavorable, destruction, severe difficulties, death-like situations, failures
effects.muhurta: Strictly avoid for all auspicious activities
effects.compatibility: Very poor compatibility, destructive relationship, severe conflicts
effects.transit: Moon transit brings dangers, health crises, severe problems, destructive events
effects.activities: Avoid all activities, especially important ones

tarabalas.vedicQuote: Vadha Tara is most destructive, avoid all important activities completely

tarabalas.name: Mitra Tara
tarabalas.description: Friendship and alliance star - brings support, friendship, and beneficial partnerships

effects.general: Favorable, friendship, support, alliances, helpful people, cooperation
effects.muhurta: Good for partnership activities, friendships, alliances, social events
effects.compatibility: Good compatibility, friendly relationship, mutual support
effects.transit: Moon transit brings friends' support, social benefits, partnerships
effects.activities: Excellent for partnerships, friendships, social activities, cooperation

negativeAspects: May depend too much on others
tarabalas.compatibility: 75% - Good compatibility with friendly, supportive relationship
tarabalas.vedicQuote: Mitra Tara brings friendship and support from all directions

tarabalas.name: Ati-Mitra Tara
tarabalas.description: Best friend and supreme fortune star - brings exceptional support and success

effects.general: Excellent for all activities, supreme support, best outcomes, fortune, dharma
effects.muhurta: Best for all auspicious activities, especially spiritual and dharmic
effects.compatibility: Excellent compatibility, best friend relationship, supreme harmony
effects.transit: Moon transit brings exceptional fortune, spiritual growth, best support
effects.activities: All activities highly favored, especially spiritual and dharmic

tarabalas.compatibility: 100% - Excellent compatibility, best friend relationship, supreme harmony
tarabalas.vedicQuote: Ati-Mitra Tara is most auspicious, brings supreme fortune and dharma

calculationMethod.name: Tarabala Calculation Method
calculationMethod.description: How to calculate which Tara any nakshatra falls in from birth nakshatra

steps.example: If born in Rohini nakshatra (4th nakshatra)

steps.instruction: Count from birth nakshatra to target nakshatra
steps.example: To find Tara of Ashwini: Count Rohini(1), Mrigashira(2), Ardra(3)... until Ashwini

steps.instruction: Identify which count it falls on
steps.example: Ashwini is 24th from Rohini (going forward through all 27 nakshatras)
Ashwini is Sadhaka Tara from Rohini = Achievement energy, favorable

calculationMethod.formula: Count = (Target Nakshatra Number - Birth Nakshatra Number) modulo 27
calculationMethod.importantNote: Always count forward from birth nakshatra through the cycle

applications.name: Tarabala Applications
applications.description: Practical uses of Tarabala in various areas

applications.usage: Select date when Moon is in favorable Tara from birth nakshatra
applications.method: Check Moon's nakshatra on proposed date, calculate its Tara from birth nakshatra
applications.favorable: Sampat, Sadhaka, Ati-Mitra, Kshema, Mitra Taras
applications.neutral: Janma Tara (use with other positive factors)
applications.example: For marriage: Choose date when Moon is in Sampat or Ati-Mitra Tara

applications.usage: Check Tara compatibility between partners' birth nakshatras
applications.method: Calculate Tara of bride's nakshatra from groom's, and vice versa
applications.excellent: Both in Sampat/Ati-Mitra/Sadhaka Taras from each other
applications.poor: Either in Vipat/Vadha/Pratyak from each other
applications.reject: Both in malefic Taras from each other
applications.example: Groom Rohini, Bride Hasta = Check both directions for compatibility

applications.usage: Predict Moon transit effects based on Tara
applications.method: Daily Moon nakshatra's Tara from birth nakshatra shows day's energy
applications.unfavorable: Vipat/Vadha days = be cautious, avoid important activities
applications.planning: Schedule important activities on favorable Tara days
applications.example: Surgery scheduled? Avoid Vipat/Vadha Tara days, choose Kshema/Sadhaka

applications.method: Check Tara between two people's birth nakshatras
applications.interpretation: Mutual Tara positions show relationship nature
applications.example: Friend born in your Mitra Tara = natural friendship

applications.usage: Select partners with favorable Tara compatibility
applications.method: Check business partner's nakshatra Tara from yours
applications.best: Sampat, Mitra, Ati-Mitra Taras = prosperous partnership
applications.avoid: Vipat, Vadha, Pratyak Taras = problematic partnership
applications.example: Business partner in your Sampat Tara = wealth partnership

applications.usage: Choose travel dates with favorable Moon Tara
applications.method: Check Moon's Tara on travel date
applications.safe: Kshema, Mitra, Ati-Mitra Taras = safe journey
applications.danger: Vipat, Vadha Taras = avoid travel if possible
applications.example: Long journey? Schedule on Kshema Tara day for safe travel

applications.combinedAnalysis: Use Tarabala with other factors (tithi, vara, yoga, karana) for complete muhurta

remedies.name: Tarabala Remedies
remedies.description: Remedial measures for malefic Tara effects
generalRemedies: White clothing on malefic Tara days
Charity to those born in favorable Taras
remedies.protection: Wear protective amulets, carry protective mantras on malefic Tara days
remedies.timing: Perform remedies on favorable Tara days for maximum effect

considerations.name: Important Considerations
considerations.description: Key points to remember when using Tarabala
points: Tarabala is one factor - combine with complete muhurta analysis
Birth nakshatra accuracy crucial - wrong nakshatra gives wrong Taras
Both directions matter in compatibility (A→B and B→A)
Pada within nakshatra can fine-tune but Tara is nakshatra-based
Planetary transits override Tarabala effects to some extent
Strong birth chart can overcome some malefic Tara effects
For critical activities, avoid malefic Taras completely
Favorable Taras enhance already good planetary positions
Muhurta selection should prioritize Sampat and Ati-Mitra Taras
considerations.vedicReferences: Tarabala system detailed in muhurta texts and Brihat Samhita

examples.calculation: Count from Rohini(1) to Uttara Phalguni = 9 positions forward
examples.decision: Highly auspicious date, proceed with marriage
Perfect date for business launch, expect prosperity

examples.groomToBride: Count Mrigashira to Chitra = 10 positions = Janma Tara (10th)
examples.brideToGroom: Count Chitra to Mrigashira = 18 positions = Ati-Mitra Tara (18th)
examples.interpretation: One way neutral, other way excellent
examples.decision: Moderate to good compatibility, proceed with other positive factors

examples.calculation: Count Pushya to Swati = 8 positions forward
Count Hasta forward to Ardra = 21 positions (13→14→...→27→1→...→6)
examples.decision: Avoid travel on this date, reschedule to favorable Tara day
